name: eiscue-ice
flavor_texts: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold.
This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey.
text: Eiscue-ice is the Penguin Pokémon. It is a ice-type Pokémon. Abilities: ice-face. Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 80, Defense: 110, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 90, Speed: 50. Evolution line: eiscue. Lore: It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold. This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey.
